name: ai-usage-watch
description: AI 模型 API Key 管理与额度监控 uTools 插件 / AI API Key Manager & Quota Watcher

scripts.pack-upx: vite build && cd dist && copy ..\plugin.json plugin.json && copy ..\preload.js preload.js && copy ..\logo.png logo.png && tar -a -c -f ..\ai-usage-watch-1.0.0.upx plugin.json preload.js logo.png index.html assets\ 2>nul && del plugin.json preload.js logo.png && echo 打包完成: ai-usage-watch-1.0.0.upx
